project-orchestrator.description: Orchestrates autonomous document creation with folder-per-project workflow. Extracts project name from user input, creates projects/<project-name>/ folder, initializes AGENTS.md, then delegates to Business Analyst, Solution Architect, and Database Administrators to produce complete project documentation within that project folder.

business-analyst.description: Creates BRD and PRD for web application projects. Delegates to Solution Architect after completion.

solution-architect.description: Reviews requirements, creates architecture + best practices docs, and delegates to DB agents for database design.

db-sql-admin.description: Designs SQL database architecture — schema, normalization, indexing, partitioning, and scaling strategy.

db-nosql-admin.description: Designs NoSQL database architecture — document modeling, sharding, consistency patterns, and denormalization strategy.
